Current President - Zhang Guanghong

Home > Current President Zhang Guanghong
Martial Arts Lineage｜Martial Arts Experience

Academic Background

Education: Master of Business Administration (EMBA) Graduate, National Cheng Kung University College of Management

Martial Arts Lineage

Liu Yunqiao: Baji Quan, Pigua Zhang, Bagua Zhang.
Wei Xiaotang: Eight Step Praying Mantis Fist
Xu Ji: Long Fist, Bagua Zhang, Baji Quan, Pigua Zhang.
Xi Jiajun: Bagua Zhang.




Martial Arts Experience

  • Vice Chairman, Chinese Wutan Martial Arts Promotion Association
  • National Level A Referee, Chinese Martial Arts Association of the Republic of China
  • National Level Martial Arts Sports Coach, Republic of China Sports Federation
  • Committee Member, Coach Committee, Taipei City Martial Arts Association
  • Coach, Wutan Martial Arts Promotion Centre
  • Coach, Baji Quan Committee Preparatory Coach Class, Chinese Martial Arts Association of the Republic of China
  • Martial Arts Club Instructor, China Institute of Technology, Shih Hsin University
  • Professional Martial Arts Teacher, Physical Education Office, Shih Hsin University
  • Martial Arts Teacher, Overseas Youth Summer Return to Homeland Study Camp, Youth Corps
